name: TASE Quote
description: Get the current quote for any Israeli security (stocks, bonds, ETFs) using its numeric TASE ID.
exampleQuery: What's the current price of TASE security 1150283?

sampleResponse.summary: Teva (TASE 1150283) is trading at 72.50 ILS, up 1.8%.
insights: Teva is trading near its session high.
